name: annotatekit
description: Add AnnotateKit to an iOS app and turn precise on-screen annotations into verified Codex code changes.

interface.longDescription: AnnotateKit installs a Debug-only visual feedback overlay in an iOS app and bundles the local MCP bridge Codex needs. Select the exact interface element, describe the change, and tap Send. Codex receives its position, accessibility identity, nearby text, hierarchy, intent, severity, and thread, then implements, verifies, replies, and resolves the work.
defaultPrompt: Set up AnnotateKit in this iOS app.
Watch for AnnotateKit feedback and implement each verified fix.
